description: Golden dataset template for agent/LLM evaluation. Copy, fill 'cases', hold out a split you never tune against. Fields marked optional apply to specific eval types.

context: Optional: retrieved chunks provided to the model (RAG tasks).
cases.expected_output: The gold answer or reference (for reference-based metrics).

expected_trajectory.tool: optional: expected tool name for agent-trajectory eval

notes: Stratify by 'category' and report per-category metrics. Rotate the holdout as behavior/attackers drift.
